name: manifest-dev-experimental
description: Maximally-slim experimental rework of manifest-dev. The /verify skill is gone — /do absorbs verification inline by spawning subagents per Acceptance Criterion. The manifest schema collapses to four fields (prompt, agent, model, phase) with always-subagent verification. Each surviving skill keeps only the words that steer non-default model behavior; everything else is trusted to capability. Lives alongside manifest-dev until promotion.

Stop.description: Block premature stops during /do; inject reload reminder
